name: Minimalist Tech Realism v1
palette: near-monochrome physical world (cool grey + clean white)
color only inside XR layer: primary blue #4a8eff, normal green #22c55e, warning amber #f59e0b, alarm red #ef4444
lighting: soft even ambient light, no harsh highlights, near shadowless cleanroom, restrained self-illumination
principles: physical space is minimalist and almost empty — no physical display screens or monitors
all information lives only in the XR layer (holographic, anchored in space)
negative space is the luxury; do not over-decorate with glow effects
recognizably the real filter-element assembly workshop, but its upgraded near-future version
